course_title: A Wholly Different Way of Living
course_descriptor: J. Krishnamurti in dialogue with Allan W. Anderson, San Diego 1974
deliverable_target: a faithful, source-conscious chapter sequence for A Wholly Different Way of Living, preserving the themes of knowledge, pleasure, love, meditation, and the possibility of a fundamentally different life.
visual_target: selected frames are supporting evidence for speaker identity, conversation setting, on-screen titling, and dialogue structure; do not let them override the spoken content.
mathematical_standard: preserve conceptual precision and distinctions, but do not invent formal philosophy or psychology exposition beyond the source.
style_target: notes should read like a serious companion text on attention, fear, pleasure, love, thought, and inner freedom, with explicit separation between observation, claim, and interpretation.
credit_target: keep explicit credit to J. Krishnamurti, Allan W. Anderson, the Krishnamurti Foundation Trust, and curation by LazyingArt LLC.
front_matter_single: Original dialogue by J. Krishnamurti with Allan W. Anderson. Lecture notes organized by \href{https://lazying.art}{LazyingArt LLC}.
front_matter_plural: Original dialogues by J. Krishnamurti with Allan W. Anderson. Lecture notes organized by \href{https://lazying.art}{LazyingArt LLC}.

reference_no_match_text: Matching course reference PDFs were found, but no strong topical excerpt was automatically matched for this dialogue.
